description: Clock generator - generates periodic events with configurable period
name: CLOCK_c
anomalies: SuperBlock - contains internal EVTDLY_c and CLKSPLIT_f blocks
Internal feedback loop for periodic event generation
No explicit configuration parameters at top level
criticalRules: Ports are defined by CLKOUTV_f internal block
Period configured via internal EVTDLY_c parameters
Internal blocks MUST be: EVTDLY_c, CLKSPLIT_f, CLKOUTV_f (NOT CLKOUT_f).
Must have CommandControlLinks: EVTDLY_c.cmd -> CLKSPLIT_f.ctrl, CLKSPLIT_f.cmd1 -> CLKOUTV_f.ctrl, CLKSPLIT_f.cmd2 -> EVTDLY_c.ctrl.
